pattern: Because the string is a guaranteed valid parenthesization, a single running counter that rises on every open parenthesis and falls on every close parenthesis tracks the current nesting level, and its highest value during the scan is the answer.
hints: Only the parentheses characters affect nesting; every digit and arithmetic symbol can be skipped over.
Keep a running counter starting at zero: increase it by one on '(' and decrease it by one on ')'.
Track the highest value the counter ever reaches while scanning left to right, and return that as the nesting depth.

edge_inputs.description: shortest possible input, a lone digit with no parentheses
shortest possible input with parentheses, a single empty pair
several sibling groups at the same depth, none nested, so the max stays low
deep nesting followed by a shallow group, max must come from the deep part seen earlier
arithmetic operators mixed throughout without changing the depth

stress.description: randomly generated valid parenthesization built from nested groups joined by operators and digits
